huffines-don.text: Don Huffines (Republican) is a candidate for Texas Comptroller of Public Accounts.
Don Huffines's recorded background: Don Huffines, former state senator from the 16th district (2015–2019) and candidate for governor in 2022.
As of 2026-02-21, Don Huffines's campaign had raised $1,327,355 in campaign receipts and spent $7,841,416, per Texas Ethics Commission filings (this filing period only, not a cycle-to-date total).

eckhardt-sarah.text: Sarah Eckhardt (Democratic) is a candidate for Texas Comptroller of Public Accounts.
Sarah Eckhardt's recorded background: Sarah Eckhardt, state senator from the 14th district (2020–present).
As of 2026-02-21, Sarah Eckhardt's campaign had raised $57,884 in campaign receipts and spent $58,912, per Texas Ethics Commission filings (this filing period only, not a cycle-to-date total).

base.summary: Texas Comptroller of Public Accounts race: Don Huffines, Sarah Eckhardt. This overview lists each candidate's party, background, and campaign finance where available in our data set.
base.caveats: Our data set for this race covers candidate name, party, incumbency, background summary, and campaign finance totals where a filing was found (federal candidates file with the FEC; Texas state offices file with the Texas Ethics Commission -- each finance bullet names which). We do not have recorded voting histories or issue-by-issue policy positions for these candidates in this data set.

now.text: No recorded evidence in our set to project from for Don Huffines.
No recorded evidence in our set to project from for Sarah Eckhardt.
